headline: Will Hubbell (HUBB) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Hubbell (HUBB) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Hubbell (HUBB) Upgraded to Buy: Here's Why
summary: Hubbell (HUBB) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.
